articles.title: Crypto Clout: 64% Of BNB Coins Belong To Former Binance Boss
articles.description: Changpeng Zhao (CZ), the former CEO of Binance, a leading cryptocurrency exchange, is currently serving a four-month prison sentence for breaching anti-money laundering regulations. Despite his incarceration, CZ’s control over Binance Coin (BNB), the platform’s native token, remains robust. articles.title: Ripple Gets Big Break: SEC Lowers Settlement Demand To $103 Million
articles.description: A glimmer of hope emerged for Ripple Labs this week in their ongoing legal battle with the SEC. The Securities and Exchange Commission slashed its proposed settlement amount from a staggering $2 billion to a more manageable $102.6 million. While this represents a significant concession, Ripple still faces a tough decision: accept the deal and […]
